title: DUDU N GIRLIE Baby Blanket for Newborn | Warm & Cosy Cellular Baby Blanket | 100% Extra Soft Breathable Cotton, Pram/Travel/Moses Basket (90 x 70 cm) White.
features: BABY ESSENTIAL – Cotton cellular blanket is a must have on any new mum's shopping list as it's breathable, lightweight and stylish. It's made using a innovative "cell" construction to trap heat in the winter and keep your little one cool when it's hot.

Premium Quality: Made from 100 % high-quality cotton. Our eco-friendly cellular blanket is quick-drying and can be washed easily in a washing machine and tumble dried on low, The more you wash the softer it becomes.

Ultimate Comfort: The lightweight baby blanket for newborn is very comfortable, providing your child with a feeling of warmth and safety. The breathable material of the throw blanket keeps your child comfy all night long, ensuring sound sleep. The skin friendly blanket is one of the best choices for a baby's sensitive skin.

A COSY LIGHTWEIGHT LAYER: Whether they’re out and about in a pushchair or sleeping peacefully in their cot, a cellular blanket is a great way to keep baby cosy and snug. Designed with a clever ‘cell’ construction, it traps the air to keep baby cool in summer and warm in winter.

Multipurpose Blanket: The ideal choice for your little angel. Wrap up your little baby with it in the baby cot, baby crib, baby pram, car seat, etc. The soft blanket can also serve as a stroller cover, or to cuddle and carry around your child during shopping.
description: VERSATILE: Multi-purpose can be used as a household blanket, sofa blanket, and decorative blankets or as a throws. SIZE: Pram/Moses Basket/ Crib/Travel Cot: 70x90cm, Cot bed: 100x150cm,Single bed: 180x230cm, Double Bed: 230x230cm KING 260cm x 230cm approx. LIGHTWEIGHT CELLULAR WEAVE: The "cell" structure and design allows for both air flow and insulation keeping your body cool during the warmer months and warm in the winters. The zero twist construction together with the combing process removes any shorter cotton fibres and gives the blanket a light weight feeling. PREMIUM CRAFTSMANSHIP: Expertly tailored the sides are hemmed tightly using single needle reverse stitching to prevent shredding and fraying while washing. Self-bound edges and mitered corners add to the clean design and lasting durability of this blanket. The strong durable long staple length cotton fibres used further make the blanket hard wearing. SUBTLE SOFTNESS: Woven from the finest Premium Ring Spun Cotton yarns for softness and easy care, this blanket is the perfect layer to add to your bed. Cotton's superior breathability makes this blankets ideal for bedding all year round. Our premium cotton can be machine washed and dried, and will come out softer and cozier with each wash. ETHICALLY PRODUCED: Made from natural fibres that are processed adhering to all safety and environmental standards. No harmful chemicals and dyes have been used. Our factories are OEKOTEX certified with zero pollutant emissions.
